text:
Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: State-assigned unique managed care identification number. The field can contain any alphanumeric 
characters, digits, or symbols (e.g., 01234816, 45, CH) 

COMMENT: This variable will never contain NULL values. 

This field, in conjunction with other fields, can be used to link to other TAF. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
